title: Senior Backend Developer (Python/Django)
description: REQUIREMENTS: Ideally having a degree in Computer Science and strong Engineering background, Minimum of 5 years software development experience and exposure to the web applications & architectures, Excellent knowledge of Python. Having experience at developing back-end solutions, Experienced at MVC pattern, RESTful web services, and web frameworks; e.g. Django, Good at developing Node.js based asynchronous solutions, Working knowledge on synchronous programming by means of utilizing frameworks such as, Gevent, Tornado, Asyncio, Node.js, etc. Having experience on building multi-threaded and multi-process solutions, Good at working with RDBMS’s (PostgreSQL) and No-SQL databases (MongoDB), Having prior interest on trading (@Fiat and/or Crypto currencies) is desired but not strictly required, Working knowledge on Blockchain technology and ecosystem, Strong verbal and written communication skills. JOB DESCRIPTION: Develops new features and handles maintenance activities for our web-based exchange platform. Upholds a high standard of code quality via following best practices and DevOps automation. Writes clean, maintainable and testable code. Expected to turn business goals into tech solutions. Supports the entire application lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, and support). Recommends engineering solutions for both functional and non-functional requirements. Works with Agile development methodology and principles. Follows engineering approaches while developing software and apply design principles fits with the selected software architecture. Mentor others, does code reviews, and performs pair programming.

title: Backend Engineer - REMOTE
description: Talenthaus, Türkiye'nin en iyi teknoloji yetenekleri ile sektöründe öncü teknoloji şirketlerini buluşturarak anlamlı ilişkiler kuran ve kariyer gelişimleri sağlayan yetenek platformudur. Platformumuzda, 60'tan fazla teknolojide uzman mühendislerle profesyonel olarak büyüyor, anlamlı ilişkiler kuruyor ve yaptığımız işi her gün daha keyifli hale getiriyoruz. Sektöründe öncü bir teknoloji şirketi için Backend Engineer poz., Remote çalışma kapsamında ekip arkadaşları arıyoruz. Teknoloji Stack'imiz (Our Technology Stack) .NET/C#, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Kafka, Azure Service Bus, Redis, MongoDB Atlas, Docker Aranan Nitelikler (Qualifications) 2+ yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi C# deneyimi güçlü bir artıdır. Java, Go gibi dillerde yetkin olup C# öğrenmeye ve kullanmaya istekli olmak da yeterlidir Clean code yazmaya tutkulu olmak ve bunu yaparken yazılım prensiplerine hakim olmak OOP'a dair sağlam (SOLID) bir anlayış gereklidir. TDD & DDD prensipleri konusunda temel bilgi bir artıdır Microservices mimarisi ve dağıtık sistemler konusunda temel bilgi bir artıdır Azure, AWS, GCP gibi bulut servislerinden en az biriyle temel düzeyde deneyim Docker deneyimi. Kubernetes deneyimi bir artıdır Kafka, RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma servislerine aşinalık/deneyim bir artıdır Git ve kollaboratif geliştirme süreçlerinde güçlü deneyim Güçlü bir ekibin parçası olmak, Milyonlarca kullanıcıya dokunan ürünlerde iz bırakmak, Kariyerinizde yeni bir sıçrama yapmak istiyorsanız… 📩 Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: OREDATA is a Digital Transformation & IT Consulting firm with 10+ years of proven expertise and hundreds of successfully implemented projects across the EMEA region. When you join the OREDATA team, you'll be working hand-in-hand with experts focused on tackling digital, operational, analytical & data science challenges with the greatest impact. We foster collaboration with proximity, an agile and autonomous approach and best practices and guiding principles. Read more: https://medium.com/@oredata-engineering Apply and be part of our exciting journey! Requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field Minimum 5 years of professional software development experience Strong hands-on experience with TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, and Fastify Proven experience developing scalable backend systems and high-traffic applications Strong experience with PostgreSQL, database design, query optimization, and performance tuning Strong understanding of Event-Driven Architecture and Event-Driven Development Experience with AWS services (ECS, RDS, S3 or similar) Experience integrating WhatsApp Business API, Telegram Bot API, or similar messaging platforms Experience with React and Next.js Experience with real-time communication technologies (Socket.IO, WebSockets, or WebRTC) Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills Strong Experience: Experience with Vercel AI SDK Experience building RAG-based applications using LangChain or similar frameworks Experience developing AI-powered chatbots, assistants, or conversational AI platforms Familiarity with MCP, RAG, AI Agents, and Agentic Workflows Get to know us If you want to know more about us and what we do, then visit our website: www.oredata.com Why Oredata? Remote working and flexible time off Open communication, flexibility and start-up spirit Learning & Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth Opportunity to get company paid Professional Certificates (Google Cloud Platform, Confluent Kafka, etc) Access to Online Training Platforms (Udemy, Pluralsight, A Cloud Guru, Coursera, etc.) Dynamic work ecosystem where you can take initiative and responsibility Opportunity to work on international projects Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Policy Kişisel verileriniz işe alım sürecinin yürütülebilmesi amacıyla veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla şirketimiz Oredata Yazılım A.Ş. tarafından işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi ve haklarınızla ilgili detaylı bilgiye https://oredata.com/personal-data-protection-policy/ bağlantısı üzerinden ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Software Engineer (Backend and Infrastructure)- Rapsodo Studios
description: We are looking for a Software Engineer (Backend and Infrastructure) to help build, maintain, and improve our backend services, development infrastructure, CI/CD systems, and internal technical workflows. This role sits between backend development, DevOps, automation, infrastructure, technical operations, and AI tooling. You will contribute to online services while helping keep our build, deployment, development, and operational environments reliable, efficient, and scalable. We welcome candidates at different experience levels, including recent graduates. We value problem-solving ability, learning speed, technical curiosity, ownership, and demonstrated effort more than perfect stack matching. About The Team We are a high-talent density team building simulation and gaming products. Engineers work across backend systems, infrastructure, automation, tooling, AI workflows, and product development depending on project needs. We value ownership, clear communication, continuous learning, and practical problem solving. Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend services and APIs using Go (Golang) Design and support online features, integrations, and distributed systems Contribute to system architecture, technical design, and code reviews Manage databases, CI/CD pipelines, and development infrastructure Automate build, test, deployment, and release processes Deploy, maintain, and troubleshoot Docker-based services and environments Monitor system performance, reliability, security, and operational health Investigate and resolve production and infrastructure issues Support local LLM infrastructure and AI-assisted development workflows Evaluate and integrate new technologies, tools, and engineering best practices Requirements Must Have Strong software engineering fundamentals and problem-solving skills Experience with at least one programming language (Go, C#, Java, Python, or similar) Experience gained through professional work, internships, academic projects, open-source contributions, or personal projects Solid knowledge of Git and Linux environments Strong analytical and troubleshooting abilities Good written and reading comprehension in English Nice to Have Experience with Docker, CI/CD tools (TeamCity, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) Familiarity with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or Redis Knowledge of Nginx, Traefik, Kubernetes, microservices, and networking fundamentals Understanding of infrastructure security, monitoring, and system administration Experience with local LLM platforms (Ollama, vLLM, Open WebUI, etc.) Experience in backend systems, online services, gaming, or simulation platforms Demonstrated passion for technology through personal projects, homelab environments, research, or open-source contributions Degrees qualifying under Türkiye's Bilişim Personeli regulations are an advantage
